figures.caption: Figure 4. Performance comparison between DDQN and targetaligned DDQN on four games of the MINATAR benchmark. Curves represent median returns, smoothed over 10 points,

Figure 2. Performance comparison between DQN and targetaligned DQN on four games of the MINATAR benchmark over five seeds. Curves represent median returns, smoothed over 10 points, and shaded areas indicate interquartile ranges.

Figure 3. Performance comparison between SAC and targetaligned SAC on six games of the MUJOCO benchmarks over five seeds. Curves represent median returns, smoothed over 10 points, and shaded areas indicate interquartile ranges.
Figure 5. Per-seed performance comparison between DQN and target-aligned DQN on four games of the MINATAR benchmarks. Curves represent returns, smoothed over 10 points.
Figure 6. Per-seed performance comparison between SAC and target-aligned SAC on six games of the MINATAR benchmarks. Curves represent returns, smoothed over 10 points.
